title: Ultra Low End
description: Minecraft for potato laptop or PC. LATEST VERSION AVAILABLE 1.21.11
body:
#  Ultra Low End

![UltraLowEndTITLE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3425d80c07fad3ac5ada897e3fec3f592d08b397.png)

### *Minecraft for school laptops, old PCs, and potato hardware*

> **Runs on laptops that struggle with vanilla.**  
> Built for **school computers, Intel HD graphics, 4–8 GB RAM**, and anyone who just wants Minecraft to run properly.

---

## 🚀 What is this modpack?
**Ultra Low-End Minecraft** is a carefully tuned optimization modpack designed to squeeze every possible FPS out of weak hardware — **without changing gameplay**.

If your laptop:
- sounds like a jet engine  
- gets 20 FPS in vanilla  
- freezes while loading worlds  

👉 this pack is for you.

---

## 💻 Target Hardware (IMPORTANT)
This modpack is made specifically for:
- School / college laptops  
- Intel HD / UHD / Iris graphics  
- Older AMD integrated GPUs  
- 4–8 GB RAM systems  
- Low-power CPUs (i3, Ryzen 3, Pentium, etc.)

If your PC already runs shaders at 200 FPS, **this pack isn’t for you**.

---

## ⚡ Performance Gains
Typical results (varies by system):

| Scenario | Vanilla | Ultra Low-End |
|-------|--------|---------------|
| Fresh world | 25–40 FPS | **60–100+ FPS** |
| Multiplayer | Lag spikes | **Much smoother** |
| Loading time | Long | **Significantly faster** |
| Laptop temps | Hot 🔥 | **Cooler & quieter** |

---

## 🧠 What this pack focuses on
✔ FPS improvements  
✔ Reduced RAM usage  
✔ Faster loading times  
✔ Less stuttering  
✔ No gameplay changes  
✔ Multiplayer-safe  

❌ No shaders  
❌ No fancy visuals  
❌ No content mods  

This is **pure performance**.

---

## 🧩 What’s inside (high-level)
- Modern rendering optimizations  
- Smart culling (don’t render what you can’t see)  
- Faster chunk loading  
- Reduced memory overhead  
- Input & UI optimizations  

All included mods are:
- lightweight  
- well-maintained  
- chosen specifically for **low-end systems**

---

## 🛠️ Recommended Settings (READ THIS)
For best results:
- **Render Distance:** 6–8  
- **Simulation Distance:** 4  
- **Graphics:** Fast  
- **Clouds:** Off  
- **Particles:** Minimal  
- **VSync:** Off  

You can fine-tune settings in-game depending on your hardware.

---

## 🧪 Stability & Compatibility
- Tested on low-end hardware  
- Compatible with most servers  
- Works with resource packs (lightweight packs recommended)  
- No OptiFine required  

---

## ❓ FAQ

### Will this change vanilla gameplay?
No. Gameplay remains **100% vanilla**.

### Does this work on school laptops?
Yes — that’s the main goal of this pack.

### Is this better than OptiFine?
On modern Minecraft versions, **yes**, especially for low-end systems.

### Can I add mods on top?
Yes, but adding heavy mods will reduce performance.

---

Every download and review helps the pack grow.

---

This modpack is actively maintained:
- Broken mods are removed quickly

- **Stability always comes first**

---

### 🟢 Final Note
> **If vanilla Minecraft struggles on your laptop — this modpack exists for you.**

NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT.
